basic_details.job_title: TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Programme Manager, DEO and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Medicinal Plant Farms & Herbal Medicines Corporation (TAMPCOL)
basic_details.post_name: Programme Manager, Data entry operator and more posts
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Medicinal Plant Farms & Herbal Medicines Corporation (TAMPCOL) Recruitment 2026: Tamil Nadu Medicinal Plant Farms & Herbal Medicines Corporation has released the official notification for 10 Programme Manager posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TAMPCOL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tampcol.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TAMPCOL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TAMPCOL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for TAMPCOL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://tampcol.co.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026 is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for various posts in the Tamil Nadu Medicinal Plant Farms & Herbal Medicines Corporation (TAMPCOL) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. Where can I download the application form for TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: You can download the application form for TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026 from the official website of TAMPCOL, which is https://tampcol.co.in.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for the posts advertised by TAMPCOL?
faq.answer: The job type for the posts advertised by TAMPCOL in this recruitment drive is contractual.

faq.question: Q6. What is the official website of TAMPCOL?
faq.answer: The official website of Tamil Nadu Medicinal Plant Farms & Herbal Medicines Corporation (TAMPCOL) is https://tampcol.co.in.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application start date is 06th July 2026, and the application last date is 17th July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Which posts are being recruited by TAMPCOL in this notification?
faq.answer: TAMPCOL is recruiting for posts including Programme Manager, Consultant, Account Manager, Data Entry Operator, System Analyst, and IT Assistant.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the post of IT Assistant?
faq.answer: There are 4 vacancies available for the post of IT Assistant in the TAMPCOL Recruitment 2026.
